unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I've gone by minibus all the way to the north of Thailand.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: Mini(小) + bus(巴士) = 小型巴士

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I have never flown in a helicopter.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: Helic (螺旋) + pter (翼) = 像蜻蜓一样的直升机

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Yes, I took a tram in Lisbon when I was on holiday.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 特(T)别让(ram)它在轨道上跑

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My brother's got a motorbike and now he's learning to ride it.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: Motor(发动机) + bike(自行车) = 摩托车

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My dad rides his scooter to work.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: S(蛇)c(看)oo(眼镜)ter(特)：蛇看着戴眼镜的特种兵骑踏板车

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Write the words under the photos... an underground train.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: Under(在下面) + ground(地面) = 地下的火车(地铁)

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I had to walk home because I missed the bus.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 迷(mi)死(ss)了，结果错过了车

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I have never flown in a helicopter.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: F(飞)l(了)y(远)：飞远了

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I ran very fast but I didn't catch the train.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: C(猫)at(在)ch(车)上：猫在车上赶上了

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The rain was terrible so we took a taxi.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: Ta(他)ke(渴)：他渴了要坐车去买水

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: A pupil at Gulu Village Primary School, China, rides a donkey.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: R(人)i(爱)de(得)：人爱得骑马的感觉

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We got in the car and we drove to France.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: Dr(大人)i(爱)ve(车)：大人爱开车

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I wanted to be more independent so I changed and started driving my taxi.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: In(不) + dependent(依赖) = 独立的

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: About a year ago, a really famous actor got in my taxi.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: Fam(家)e(一)ous(多)：家里名声一多就出名了

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I've had film stars, politicians, you know, lots of famous people.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: Politi(政治) + cian(人) = 政治家

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He said some things that weren't very polite!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: Po(婆)lite(亮)：婆婆说话很漂亮，很有礼貌

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: One time a passenger left his teeth here! Not real teeth, of course false teeth.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: False(假的) + teeth(牙齿) = 假牙

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Once a doctor stopped me outside a hospital and asked me to take a skeleton to another hospital.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: Sk(死)ele(饿)ton(吨)：死后饿了几吨重，只剩骨架

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's because for them going to school means a better future.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: Fu(富)ture(处)：未来处处是财富

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They hope to get a job and money, so they can help their families and their neighbours.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: Neigh(你)bour(不)s(死)：你邻居不死，天天来串门

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: These children in Indonesia have to cross a bridge ten metres above a dangerous river.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: A(一)cross(十字路口)：穿过一个十字路口

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The children have a dangerous journey: the path is only 45 centimetres wide in some places.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: Jour(久)ney(泥)：久久走在泥泞的旅行路上

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: So girls are happy to take a risk in order to get to school.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: Take(拿) a risk(危险)：拿自己的安危去冒险

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's a tiny village - only very few people live there.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: Ti(踢)ny(你)：极小的球，你一踢就飞了

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Every morning they walk along the tracks to get to their school.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: T(铁)r(路)acks(一条条)：一条条铁路轨道

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The path is only 45 centimetres wide in some places.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: W(我)ide(爱)的：我爱的路要宽宽的

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Read Mariana's essay about 'Someone I admire'.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: Ad(广告)mire(泥)：广告里的泥巴也让人钦佩(比如抗泥洪英雄)

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Because he is helping other people... and because he has learned a lot about another culture.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: Cul(卡)ture(车)：文化就像一辆沉稳的卡车
